svg.aria-label: pleasefindmethis.com social preview showing dead-end search versus a protected bounty

g.text: Exact item? Put a bounty on it.
Fund a request. Protect the source. Reward an accepted lead.
For sentimental, discontinued, rare, and hard-to-search things.
pleasefindmethis.com turns "I searched everywhere" into a funded request with protected source reveal.
